steps.title: Write the pressure model
steps.content:
The total pressure is the sea-level pressure plus the added pressure from descending. At a depth of $d$ feet, the model is
$$P=15.20+0.43d$$

steps.title: Substitute the depth
steps.content:
Use $d=110$ because the diver is $110$ feet below sea level.
$$P=15.20+0.43(110)$$
$$P=15.20+47.30$$
$$P=62.50$$

steps.title: Match the pressure
steps.content: The total pressure is $62.50$ psi, which matches choice A. The answer is A.
